layout.app_shell: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-0 h-screen overflow-hidden bg-[#0C0A09]
layout.sidebar: col-span-1 md:col-span-3 lg:col-span-2 border-r border-[#292524] bg-[#0C0A09] flex flex-col h-full
layout.main_feed: col-span-1 md:col-span-6 lg:col-span-7 overflow-y-auto px-4 py-8 md:px-8
layout.right_panel: hidden md:flex md:col-span-3 lg:col-span-3 border-l border-[#292524] bg-[#0C0A09] flex-col h-full p-6
layout.input_style: bg-[#0C0A09] border border-[#44403C] rounded-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#B45309] focus:border-[#B45309] text-[#E7E5E4]

button.primary: bg-[#B45309] text-[#E7E5E4] hover:bg-[#92400E] border-none font-semibold rounded-none px-6 py-2
button.secondary: bg-[#1C1917] text-[#E7E5E4] hover:bg-[#292524] border border-[#44403C] rounded-none px-6 py-2
button.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#A8A29E] hover:text-[#E7E5E4] hover:bg-[#1C1917] rounded-none px-4 py-2

components.badge: bg-[#292524] text-[#A8A29E] text-xs uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-1 rounded-none border border-[#44403C]

images.description: Dark forest cabin, off-grid aesthetic for login/landing page background
Profile picture of a homesteader in nature
Fresh organic vegetables harvest for barter post

accessibility.contrast_strategy: High contrast APCA verified for text on background. Primary text (#E7E5E4) on main background (#0C0A09)

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a dark, tactical, 'rebel homesteader' aesthetic. Do NOT use soft UI, heavy drop shadows, or large border radii. The aesthetic relies on 1px borders, high contrast, and sharp edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm).
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural app shell and feed layout. Use Shadcn components for complex interactions (Dialog, DropdownMenu, Tabs) but strip their default soft shadows and rounded corners.
The layout should mimic a social media dashboard: a sticky left navigation sidebar, a central scrollable feed for barter posts, and a right panel for matches/skills.
In the main feed, barter posts should clearly indicate 'OFFERING' and 'LOOKING FOR' using the defined badge styling.
Implement 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, feed items, navigation links) using kebab-case role-based naming.
Use Phosphor Icons for all UI iconography to maintain a utilitarian, technical feel.
Ensure the hero background image has a dark overlay (bg-black/60) so login/registration text remains readable on top of it.
Do not use generic blue/purple gradients. Any gradients should be subtle, tactical, and use the brand colors (Ochre/Amber and Obsidian).
